title: The Special Protection Group Act, 1988
full_text: The Special Protection Group Act, 1988 विशेष संरक्षा ग्रुप अधिनियम,1988 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198834 Act Number: 34 Enactment Date: 1988-06-02 Act Year: 1988 Short Title: The Special Protection Group Act, 1988 Hindi Title: विशेष संरक्षा ग्रुप अधिनियम,1988 Long Title: An Act to provide for the constitution and regulation of an armed force of the Union for providing proximate security to the Prime Minister of India and the former Prime Ministers of India and members of their immediate families and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Internal Security Enforcement Date: 01-08-1988 Notification: 1st August, 1988, vide notification No. S.O. 735(E), dated 1st August, 1988, See Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Last Updated: 08-04-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Special Protection Group Act, 1988 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Members subject to this Act. Section 4. Constitution of the Group. Section 5. Control, direction, etc. Section 6. Liability for service in and outside India. Section 7. Members of the Group always on active duty. Section 8. Resignation and withdrawal from the post. Section 9. Tenure of service. Section 10. Restrictions respecting right to from associations, freedom of speech, etc. Section 11. Termination of service. Section 12. Appeal. Section 13. Powers and duties conferable on members of the Group. Section 14. Assistance to Group. Section 15. Protection of action taken under this Act. Section 16. Power to make rules. Section 17. Laying of orders and rules. Section 18. Provision as to existing Special Protection Group.
